Updated user-guide/README.md index.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["acfs","docs"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1gmo","depends_on_id":"bd-1w9e","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T01:11:11Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-1gmo","depends_on_id":"bd-2lvp","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T01:11:11Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-1gmo","depends_on_id":"bd-3g6l","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T01:11:11Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-1gmo","depends_on_id":"bd-3nam","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-30T01:11:11Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1hac","title":"ACFS tool registry integration","description":"Background:
- Gateway setup/detection currently hardcodes tool lists and install metadata.
- ACFS (agentic_coding_flywheel_setup) now owns the canonical manifest + checksums for the stack.

Goal:
- Make ACFS manifest the single source of truth for tool metadata in this public gateway repo.

Scope:
- Define mapping types, loader, registry service, and integrate into setup/detection endpoints.

Non-goals:
- Do not embed any private infrastructure or business content.
- Do not implement installers; only surface metadata + commands.

Why this matters:
- Reduces drift across repos, keeps UI and detection in lockstep, and centralizes tool inventory decisions.

Tests / Verification (detailed logging required):
- Unit/integration: bd-1rdc, bd-6huy, bd-1kkl.
- Contract: bd-2lvp, bd-1jdm.
- E2E: bd-1uog.
- Harness: bd-a1jg.

Definition of Done:
- /setup endpoints and detection use registry-driven metadata.
- Readiness output aligns with manifest and is auditable via provenance fields.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:25:36.404946939Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T06:43:23.643864530Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T06:43:23.643716150Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["acfs","integration","registry"]}
